name: Peppered Roast Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 500°F.
2. Using a sharp, pointed knife, make one-inch deep incisions all over the roast.
3. Insert the garlic slivers into the slits so they are fully embedded in the meat.
4. Sprinkle the entire surface of the meat with black pepper.
5. Place the fat side up in a roasting pan.
6. Roast the meat, allowing 7 minutes per pound for medium-rare doneness.
7. Turn off the heat and leave the roast in the oven for an additional 2 hours without opening the oven door.
8. The finished roast will be brown and crisp on the outside with a pink interior. Serve warm or chill several hours. Cut into very thin slices to serve.
